title: Create: Fresh Items
description: An addon for cyberia's fresh food and the create mod
body:
# <center>Create: Fresh Items</center>

An addon for cyberia's fresh food and the create mod

## Features

This Resource Pack adds custom 3D models for almost every item in the Create Mod. The items in the GUI will remain 2D, and can be overriden by other resource packs.

*Eating Animations for food items are planned*

## Requirements

![Pommel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6bfb250fa199ed94abd7cbc96a5b1de32ad3471.png)
![Sinytra Connector (Only Forge and Neoforge)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a2550ea87d37326852ab16160adbc860adf3a31_0.webp)
![Puzzle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7e10a673633bd06b667fa804c4393d08e4f08af.png)


## Credits
- Inspired from [Fresh Food](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-food)
- Honeyed Apple and Chocolate Glazed Berries was modeled by [cyberia](https://modrinth.com/user/cyberia)
- Crushed Raw Iron and Raw Zinc was modeled by [axolotl_ccp](https://modrinth.com/user/axolotl_cpp)
